projects.name: Salesforce: Agentic SDLC Tooling
description: Built IDE plugins, MCPs, and autonomous Agent Skills to accelerate developer productivity and drive AI adoption across engineering.
Achieved almost 100% weekly AI engagement, reduced on-call incident analysis time by 5x, and cut PR review wait times by ~50%.

projects.name: Salesforce: Core & Platform Services GCP Uplift
description: Led the first AWS-to-GCP uplifts in the organization, establishing foundational GCP infrastructure and executing the end-to-end migration of 4 core services to serve live customer traffic.

projects.name: Amazon VendorHoldbacks: Re-Architecture
description: Drove re-architecture from monolith to 11 microservices, leading 3 developers, enabling 6M transactions worth $2.1B at 2000 TPS.
Transformed batch processing to event-driven architecture, slashing processing time from 24h to near real-time and reducing vendor inquiries by 23.5% across 14+ countries.

projects.name: Amazon: LLM-driven Financial Reconciliation Engine
description: Developed an LLM-driven Financial Reconciliation Engine processing up to 10M records per day, accelerating anomaly detection and reducing manual work by 65%.
Utilized RAG against historical customer notes and LLM-based semantic mapping to achieve a recon accuracy of 67%.

projects.name: Amazon VendorHoldbacks: Rule Engine
description: Architected a high-throughput Rule Engine processing 5,000+ concurrent business rules with 50ms latency at 2,000 TPS.
Introduced a self-service portal cutting rule creation time from 4 weeks to minutes, enabling the business team to fully manage rule authoring and deployment.

projects.name: Amazon VendorHoldbacks: Seasonal Holdbacks
description: Developed ML-driven automated holdback system preventing $14.7MM in debit balance exposure. Built scalable pipeline processing 90,000+ vendors' historical data.
Configurable risk engine using linear regression for seasonal patterns, eliminating manual assessment for 3,600+ high-risk vendors during peak events (Prime Day, Black Friday).

projects.name: Amazon Approvals: Emails
description: Built highly configurable email orchestration system handling approval and reminder emails for sending up to 200K approval emails per day.

projects.name: Amazon: Special Merchant Data Segregation
description: Separated views, APIs, and reports between general vendors and special merchants across 20+ input sources.
Implemented config-driven onboarding, reducing new-merchant onboarding from multi-team code changes to a single config entry.

projects.name: IRageCapital: Stock Market Simulator
description: Developed a C++17 HFT market replay simulator with lock-free data structures on the hot path.
Profiled and tuned to hold per-execution latency under 50µs for strategy backtesting.
